case_title: YIP, KIN WAH et al vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF YIP, KIN WAH YIP, MELVIN A MINOR

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-03-1997, CONTINUED TO FEB-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CONT'D FOR STATUS CONFERENCE AND OSC FOR PLTF. TO PROVIDE A TRANSLATOR AND SUBMIT PROOF OF SERVICE AND AN EXPLANATION AS TO PLTF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. AND SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND FOR PLTF. TO FILE A DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, KIN WAH YIP, MELVIN A MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CHINESE RECREATION CENTER DOES 1 TO 100 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-04-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-15-1996
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, KIN WAH YIP, MELVIN A MINOR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-04-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-05-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), (FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 11/4/96) AND FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY PROSECUTE CASE. ON FOR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE ANY NEW ATTORNEY WITH A COPY OF THIS NOTICE. ANY NEW ATTORNEY IS TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY WITHOUT DELAY. IF NO GOOD CAUSE AND NO NEW ATTORNEY CASE MAY BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
